source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
At LTV.ai, we’re redefining customer engagement for e-commerce brands by automating a lot of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating creative assets without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most - the customer.



Why join us?

We’re a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that’s transforming the e-commerce industry. As an early sales hire focused on our most strategic prospects, you’ll play a critical role in scaling our go-to-market motion, refining our sales narrative, and turning the biggest names in commerce into long-term believers.



Role Responsibilities:

 - Own and drive the full sales cycle from prospecting to close across large enterprise e-commerce brands, private equity firms, and Fortune 500 prospects.

 - Collaborate closely with the founding team to refine messaging, build playbooks, and shape pricing and packaging strategies for our top-tier segment.

 - Educate prospects on how LTV.ai’s AI-powered platform transforms retention marketing and helps brands 3x Revenue per Send.

 - Maintain deep understanding of customer pain points in e-commerce and articulate how LTV.ai delivers measurable business value.

 - Partner with product and post-sales teams to ensure a smooth handoff and long-term success for every account you bring on.

 - Leverage your AI curiosity to shape how we talk about technical differentiation with a business-first lens.



What we’re looking for (ideally):

 - 5–8+ years of experience selling into enterprise accounts, ideally in SaaS, MarTech, or AI-native platforms.

 - Prior experience working with or selling into e-commerce brands—especially at the $100M+ GMV level.

 - A strong understanding of the e-commerce ecosystem, retention channels, and what operators truly care about.

 - AI-first operator - you’re curious, technically fluent, and able to translate advanced capabilities into strategic business outcomes.

 - Track record of hitting or exceeding quota in fast-moving startup environments.

 - Exceptional storytelling and communication skills, with a love for building relationships and navigating complex orgs.



Compensation + Benefits

 - Base depends a lot on the person but we reward A players

 - Equity included



If you’re curious, ambitious, and hungry to build something big, feel free to email our founder directly asad@ltv.ai - we’d love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Head of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
At LTV.ai, we’re redefining email marketing for e-commerce brands by automating a lot of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating campaigns without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most – the customer.




WHY JOIN US?

We’re a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that’s transforming the e-commerce industry. As an early team member, you’ll play a key role in shaping both our product and the future of e-commerce, with the opportunity to grow alongside us.




RECENT WINS

 - Developed a segmentation engine that leverages e-commerce platform data to personalize interactions in a compliant manner, at scale (100M+ consumers and growing 40% MoM)

 - Built out a data pipeline capable of handling millions of events daily

 - Enabled the use of multiple LLMs for a single interaction, optimized for the best performance while reducing costs

 - Onboarded some of the largest e-commerce brands across the industry (e.g. Backcountry, J. Jill, Fabletics, Sur La Table) turning them into massive believers in both our product and our vision




WE’D LIKE TO WORK ON

 - Refining our AI infrastructure to enable deeper segmentation, optimize customer-level memory, and integrate advanced agentic workflows for greater adaptability and efficiency

 - Enhancing our AI conversation engine to deliver self-optimizing interactions that gather actionable feedback

 - Expanding our image creation capabilities to provide our brands with a wider medium of emails to send, thus offsetting end brand costs and increasing product adoption




ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Serve as a hands-on engineering leader, dedicating ~70% of your time to IC-level contributions (coding, reviewing, debugging, shipping)

 - Architect and maintain scalable, reliable backend infrastructure capable of supporting rapid growth and real-time AI-powered communications

 - Validate and pressure-test architectural decisions across the stack – ensuring we build for scale without over-engineering

 - Unlock engineering velocity by removing blockers, improving developer tooling, streamlining CI/CD, and establishing lightweight processes that keep the team shipping fast

 - Enforce a high bar for code quality while keeping tech debt to near zero – you believe clean code and fast shipping are not at odds

 - Lead and mentor a growing team of engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence, high ownership, and relentless iteration

 - Drive the technical roadmap in partnership with the founding team, balancing near-term product needs with long-term infrastructure bets

 - Design and implement core infrastructure that supports AI-native applications, including multi-agent workflows, model routing, and real-time feedback loops

 - Champion AI-first engineering practices across the org – ensuring we leverage AI coding tools, AI-native architectures, and emerging LLMOps patterns to stay ahead of the industry

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with product, design, and data to prioritize and deliver high-impact features




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR (IDEALLY)

 - 8+ years of backend engineering experience with deep architectural ownership

 - Proven track record of building and scaling backend systems, preferably in fast-growing SaaS, messaging, or e-commerce environments

 - Comfortable working in TypeScript (NestJS) and AWS-based infrastructure

 - AI-first mindset – you instinctively reach for AI-native solutions when designing systems, products, and workflows

 - Deep experience with or interest in LLMOps, AI application infrastructure, and emerging tools that accelerate AI product development

 - Excitement about using AI coding tools to boost velocity (e.g. Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code)

 - A strong sense of engineering taste – you know when to build fast and when to build right, and you’re allergic to unnecessary complexity

 - Exper

source_jobs.title: Founding AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At LTV.ai, we're redefining email marketing for e-commerce brands by automating a lot of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating campaigns without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most - the customer.




WHY JOIN US?

We're a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that's transforming the e-commerce industry.

As an early engineering hire, you'll own meaningful surface area from day one — shipping AI features, shaping architecture, and building the data infrastructure that powers the platform.

You'll have the autonomy to drive features end-to-end and the leverage of unlimited AI tokens to move at a pace most teams can't match.




RECENT WINS

 - Went from 0 to $1M ARR in 6 months and just closed a growth round of funding

 - Built a segmentation engine that personalizes interactions across 70m+ consumers per month (growing 10% MoM) using e-commerce platform data, in a compliant manner, at scale

 - Stood up a data pipeline handling millions of events daily

 - Built an agentic tool-calling chat flow that automates email campaign production at scale

 - Built a chat-to-DB layer that proactively suggests customer lists to send to

 - Enabled multi-LLM routing for a single interaction, optimized for performance while reducing costs




WE'D LIKE TO WORK ON

 - Deepening our AI infrastructure: customer-level memory, agentic workflows, smarter model routing, and self-optimizing conversation engines

 - Scaling our data pipelines to handle the next order of magnitude of events without compromising latency or cost

 - Expanding self-service so any e-commerce brand can onboard and get value from LTV.ai http://LTV.ai without white-glove handoff

 - Pushing our image and content generation capabilities so brands can ship a wider range of emails at lower cost

 - Driving proactivity across the platform — from recommending the right customer lists and campaigns to expanding beyond email into multi-channel




ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own features end-to-end — from architecture and data modeling through implementation, rollout, and iteration in production

 - Work across the full backend surface: AI features, core platform architecture, and data pipelines that move millions of events daily

 - Use AI coding tools aggressively (unlimited tokens) to ship faster — while taking full responsibility for the quality, correctness, and maintainability of every line that lands in main

 - Design and build AI-native systems: multi-agent workflows, model routing, evals, and real-time feedback loops

 - Make architectural calls that hold up under growth — and revisit them when they don't

 - Pair closely with product, AI, and data on the highest-leverage work, not just the assigned tickets

 - Raise the engineering bar: code review, design review, and pushing back when something isn't ready for production




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (IDEALLY)

 - 4+ years of backend engineering experience with a track record of owning systems end-to-end in production

 - Strong engineering taste — you know the difference between shipped code and AI-generated slop, and you ship the former. Lines of code are not a flex; durable, well-reasoned systems are.

 - AI-native mindset — you instinctively reach for AI tools to move faster, but you treat their output as a draft, not a deliverable. You can oversee AI-generated work and catch what it gets wrong.

 - Experience scaling production systems in fast-moving SaaS, messaging, or e-commerce environments

 - Comfortable with TypeScript (NestJS) and AWS-based infrastructure, or able to ramp quickly

 - Real interest in LLMOps, AI application infrastructure, and the tooling around evals, prompt management, and agentic systems

 - Pragmatic and adaptable — you can hold speed and quality at the same time and don't see them as a tradeoff

 - Founder mentality — you build

source_jobs.title: Head of Talent Acquisition
source_jobs.description:
At LTV ai, we're redefining email marketing for e-commerce brands by automating a lot of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating campaigns without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most - the customer.




WHY JOIN US?

We're a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that's transforming the e-commerce industry. We recently closed our growth round, and we're scaling fast across every function — engineering, growth, sales, customer success, and beyond.

This is a founding recruiter role. You won't be inheriting a playbook, you'll be standing up the talent function from zero — sourcing strategy, interview loops, employer brand, tooling, comp philosophy, the works — and you'll do it as a true partner to the founding team.

If you've ever wanted to own hiring at a company end-to-end, shape the bar across every role we make, and build the function the way you've always thought it should be built, this is that seat.




ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own end-to-end hiring across the entire company — engineering, product, sales, customer success, growth, operations, and leadership roles

 - Build the talent function from the ground up: ATS setup, sourcing infrastructure, interview rubrics, scorecards, calibration processes, and reporting

 - Run full-cycle recruiting yourself — sourcing, outreach, screening, coordinating, closing — until volume justifies hiring beneath you

 - Partner directly with the founder and hiring managers to define role profiles, calibrate the bar, and move quickly without sacrificing quality

 - Build a sourcing engine that doesn't rely on inbound — proactive outbound, referrals, communities, and creative channels

 - Own the candidate experience end-to-end, from first touch to offer accept, in a way that reflects how we operate as a company

 - Develop and refine our employer brand and hiring narrative as we scale

 - Use AI aggressively across the recruiting workflow — sourcing, screening, outreach personalization, scheduling, and pipeline analytics

 - Bring data and rigor to hiring: pipeline health, conversion rates, time-to-hire, source-of-hire, and quality-of-hire benchmarks

 - Lay the foundation for a future talent team — the systems, processes, and standards that will let us hire 10x from here




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (IDEALLY)

 - 5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, with meaningful time spent at high-growth startups (Seed through Series B/C)

 - Proven track record hiring across functions — you've successfully closed senior engineers, GTM leaders, and CS hires, not just one swim lane

 - Founding-recruiter mentality — you've built (or are itching to build) a talent function from scratch and don't need an existing playbook to be effective

 - Exceptional sourcing chops — you can find and engage passive talent without leaning on agencies or inbound applicants

 - Strong closer — you understand candidate psychology, navigate competing offers, and consistently land top-of-market hires

 - AI-first operator — your default instinct is to use AI to streamline sourcing, outreach, screening, and ops; you actively experiment with new tools and workflows

 - High judgment on talent — you have a sharp internal bar and can calibrate it quickly to a hiring manager's needs

 - Comfortable operating with ambiguity, shifting priorities, and direct founder feedback

 - Bias toward speed without compromising on quality — you ship hires the way our engineers ship code




COMPENSATION + BENEFITS

 - Competitive compensation, equity, and a commitment to your personal and professional growth.



If this role sounds like it could be a fit, we'd love to hear from you! Feel free to reach out to our founder directly - asad@ltv.ai.

Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit? Refer them - we pay up to $5000 for a successful hire!

source_jobs.title: Head of Performance Marketing
source_jobs.description:
At LTV ai, we're redefining email marketing for e-commerce brands by automating all of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating campaigns without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most - the customer.




WHY JOIN US?

We're a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that's transforming the e-commerce industry.

This is a true 0→1 role. We've laid down the very earliest frameworks of our performance marketing function, but the engine itself is yours to build, more or less from scratch.

You won't be inheriting a playbook or managing an existing machine - you'll be architecting it, owning it, and scaling it. If you want founder-level ownership over an entire function and the autonomy to run it your way, this is that role.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Build LTV ai's entire performance marketing engine from the ground up - strategy, channels, creative, measurement, and the operating system that ties it all together

 - Own the full function end-to-end as a true operator: you set the strategy and you execute it, without waiting on a team to do the work for you

 - Run an agentic, AI-native workflow where you personally produce the creative, copy, and assets using AI tools rather than briefing out to designers, agencies, or contractors

 - Own paid acquisition across channels (Meta, Linkedin, and emerging platforms) and treat the entire funnel as a system to be instrumented, tested, and optimized

 - Build the measurement and attribution backbone so every dollar is tied to a measurable outcome

 - Establish the frameworks, tooling, and processes that let performance marketing scale efficiently as we grow

 - Partner directly with the founding team on positioning, growth strategy, and where to place the next bet




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (IDEALLY)

 - Performance marketing experience on the e-commerce brand side - you've owned paid acquisition and growth for a DTC or omni-channel brand at scale, and you understand the economics that actually matter (CAC, LTV, ROAS, payback, contribution margin)

 - A genuine 0→1 builder - you've stood up a function, a channel, or a growth motion from nothing, not just optimized inside someone else's structure

 - An agentic AI operator - your default instinct is to use AI to do the work itself. You generate creative, ad copy, landing pages, and entire campaigns with AI tools, and you've built workflows that let one person produce what used to take a full team

 - Comfortable being a hands-on individual contributor and a function owner at the same time - you'd rather build the machine and run it than manage people running it (at least to start)

 - Deep fluency across the e-commerce growth stack and a strong point of view on what's working right now across channels

 - Analytical to the core - you read the data, find the leverage, and move fast on it

 - High ownership, high autonomy, and a bias for action - you don't need a brief to get started




COMPENSATION + BENEFITS

 - Base depends a lot on the person but we reward A players

 - Equity included



If you're curious, ambitious, and hungry to build something big, feel free to email our founder directly asad@ltv.ai - we'd love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Founding Head of Product
source_jobs.description:
At LTV ai, we're redefining email marketing for e-commerce brands by automating a lot of the day-to-day manual grunt work that goes into email marketing, from segmentation, to creating campaigns without designers, to personalization.

While increasing LTV and driving measurable growth, we help brands stay focused on what matters most - the customer.




WHY JOIN US?

We're a fast-moving team building a high-growth company that's transforming the e-commerce industry. Revenue is growing fast, usage is doubling every 3 months, and we're now scaling fast with brands like Fabletics, Sur La Table, J. Jill, Backcountry, and One Kings Lane already on board.

This is a true 0→1 product leadership role. You won't be inheriting a roadmap, a team, or a playbook - you'll be building all three. Working shoulder-to-shoulder with the founders and the founding engineering team every single day, you'll own product end to end: what we build, why we build it, what's working, what isn't, and what we double down on next. If you want to shape both the product and the company at the ground floor, this is it.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Own product end to end - strategy, roadmap, prioritization, and execution - in lockstep with the founding team

 - Sit at the center of the founding and engineering teams daily: surface where people are blocked, clear the path, and keep velocity high

 - Design and run growth experiments, then ruthlessly read the results - kill what's not working, scale what is

 - Translate customer pain (and the realities of running email at $50M-$500M+ GMV brands) into a sharp, opinionated product direction

 - Define what success looks like for every initiative and hold the bar on quality, taste, and outcomes - not just shipping

 - Partner with AI, engineering, and GTM to turn our AI-native capabilities (multi-agent workflows, segmentation, image creation, self-optimizing conversations) into product brands love

 - Build the systems, rituals, and instrumentation that let us learn fast and decide faster




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (IDEALLY)

 - 3+ years in product, with real 0→1 experience - you've built products from nothing, not just managed mature ones

 - A hands-on builder, not a delegator - you write specs, prototype, dig into data, and ship alongside engineers

 - AI-first operator - your default is to reach for AI to prototype, run experiments, analyze, and build workflows; you're as comfortable in Claude Code, Cursor, or an agent workflow as you are in a roadmap doc

 - Strong technical fluency - you can hold your own with the founding engineering team on architecture and trade-offs

 - Sharp product taste and judgment - you optimize for the right outcomes and quality output, not volume or vanity metrics

 - Comfort operating with high autonomy and ownership in a fast, ambiguous, founder-led environment

 - Bonus: experience in e-commerce, MarTech, retention, or email (Klaviyo, Postscript, Attentive, etc.)




COMPENSATION + BENEFITS

 - Base depends a lot on the person but we reward A players

 - Equity included



If you're curious, ambitious, and hungry to build something big, feel free to email our founder directly asad@ltv.ai - we'd love to hear from you.

notes: High-growth e-commerce company with a strong focus on product and engineering.
